title: Frazer, Lucy - Secretary of State, Department for Culture, Media and Sport - ACOBA advice
body: "The Rt Hon Lucy Frazer left her role at the Department for Culture, Media and Sport in July 2024.  Advisor, Quantexa  The Rt Hon Lucy Frazer sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Quantexa. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Consultant, Brunswick Group  The Rt Hon Lucy Frazer sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Brunswick Group. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Honorary Fellow, Cambridge Judge Business School, University of Cambridge  The Rt Hon Lucy Frazer sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Cambridge Judge Business School, University of Cambridge. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Senior Adviser, McKinsey & Company  The Rt Hon Lucy Frazer sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with McKinsey & Company. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in February 2025; and the appointment was taken up in April 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
